overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a hooded character standing on a rocky mountain cliff at golden hour, overlooking a vast valley with a snow-capped peak, lake, and distant mountains. The scene features dramatic cloud formations and birds flying through the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit overlook with panoramic valley views

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the mountain peak
small group of birds flies through the upper portion of the frame

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands motionless on the cliff edge, gazing out at the mountain vista with slight idle animations as wind moves the cloak

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky in formation

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit illuminated by golden sunlight breaking through clouds
rolling mountain ridges extending to the left with atmospheric haze
dark silhouetted mountains forming the right boundary of the valley
calm body of water visible in the valley below reflecting the sky
stone outcrop where the character stands, with rough textured surface
vertical wooden stake or marker on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic vista shot showing a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast mountain valley during golden hour. The snow-capped central peak dominates the horizon while birds fly through the dramatic cloud formations overhead. The warm backlighting creates a silhouette effect on the character as they observe the expansive natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic vista that captures a moment of quiet contemplation overlooking a vast, sun-drenched mountain valley. It begins with a wide view of a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff, their form rendered as a silhouette against the warm backlighting of the golden hour. As the camera holds its position, the focus expands across the horizon where a dominant snow-capped peak pierces through dramatic cloud formations. The scene remains poised in this stillness, allowing birds to drift through the sky as the light emphasizes the immense scale of the natural landscape.
